name: Matrix42 ESM & UEM API
what_it_does: Matrix42 REST API for Enterprise Service Management (ESM) and Unified Endpoint Management (UEM) platform. Enables AI agents to manage ITIL service desk incidents, problems, changes, and service requests, automate endpoint provisioning and software deployment through Empirum UEM, access CMDB and asset inventory, retrieve service catalog and workflow data, manage user provisioning and digital workspace delivery, and integrate IT service data with enterprise systems across European-focused deployments.
use_cases: Managing ITIL service desk workflows from IT operations agents
Automating endpoint provisioning and software deployment from UEM agents
Accessing CMDB and IT asset data from asset management agents
Integrating service catalog workflows with enterprise HR from provisioning agents
not_for: Simple helpdesk without ITIL/ESM compliance requirements
US-only deployments without European compliance focus
Non-IT service management without endpoint management integration
best_when: A European enterprise or German public sector organization using Matrix42 wants AI agents to automate service desk workflows, endpoint management, user provisioning, and CMDB operations.
avoid_when: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise IT infrastructure data requires strict access controls. Endpoint management agents have privileged access across managed workstations and servers. GDPR compliance mandatory for EU deployments.

auth.notes: Matrix42 uses API key and OAuth 2.0 for API access. Tenant-level credentials with module-specific scopes. On-premises and cloud deployments. Active Directory / Azure AD SSO integration. GDPR-compliant data handling for EU deployments.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — enterprise ESM/UEM pricing
pricing.paid_tiers: Per-user and per-endpoint enterprise licensing; public sector pricing available
pricing.notes: Frankfurt, Germany. Founded 1992. Dominant in German-speaking markets (DACH region) for ITSM and UEM. Strong public sector (Bundesbehörden) presence. BSI C5 certified for German government. ISO 27001. European privacy-first design. Empirum UEM is separate but integrated product.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per tenant; enterprise SLA-based

known_agent_gotchas: AUTHORIZED USE ONLY: Enterprise IT and endpoint data requires strict controls
No public MCP server — REST API with OAuth2 and API key
GDPR mandatory for EU deployments — data processing agreements required
BSI C5 certification for German public sector — additional compliance requirements
On-premises deployments common in German market — API endpoint varies by deployment
Documentation primarily in German — English docs available but less comprehensive
agent_readiness.security_notes: Enterprise IT and endpoint data. GDPR, ISO27001, BSI-C5, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. EU/German data residency. Privacy-first European design. Public sector compliance.

security_score_components.security_notes: Enterprise IT data. GDPR, ISO27001, BSI-C5, SOC2. OAuth2 + API key. EU/German data residency. German public sector compliance.
